title: The Cat on the Fence
synopsis: A quiet cat on a garden fence becomes the center of attention for one curious afternoon.
sentences: Every afternoon, a black-and-white cat sat on the fence behind Aria's house.
The cat looked calm, as if she owned every garden on the street.
Aria first noticed her while watering flowers with her grandfather.
The cat did not run away when Aria moved closer.
Instead, she blinked slowly and wrapped her tail around her paws.
Aria brought out a small dish of water and placed it near the fence.
The cat jumped down, drank quietly, and then leapt back to her high place.
For the next hour, Aria watched birds, clouds, and the cat's shining green eyes.
Her grandfather said some animals know how to sit still better than people do.
When the sun began to fall, the cat finally stretched and disappeared behind a hedge.
Aria felt strangely sad to see the fence empty again.
She hoped the cat would return the next day.
